calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-08-2006 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-07-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS LAURA GALLAGHER and ROBERT PURDY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend as to causes of action 1 through 6. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/CK) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-07-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT SHERIE FRIEDLANDER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend as to causes of action 1, 2, and 6. Sustained with leave to amend as to causes of action 3, and 4, if plaintiff can allege in good faith that defendant acted outside of scope of her agency and plaintiff reasonably relied on any misrepresentations. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/CK) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
